member.office_address: 2347 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-4309

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Congressman Al Green will be accepting proposals for community project funding (CPF) to be presented for consideration in the fiscal year 2027 appropriations bill. All proposals, with all required attachments, must be completed and returned to our office by March 6, 2026, at 5 PM CST. Please note that your project will require five (5) 'Letters of Support' from any combination of the following levels of government: City, State, County.

fields.label: Enter keywords to search content.
fields.rationale: Identifies the core program for the request.

fields.label: Request Category:
fields.help_text: Please select the type of appropriations request you would like to submit.
fields.rationale: The request is for programmatic funding for NASA Science rather than a specific community project.

fields.label: This is a request for fiscal year:: Year
fields.rationale: Standard budget cycle for upcoming requests.

fields.label: State
options: Armed Forces (Canada, Europe, Africa, or Middle East)

fields.label: Phone Type:
fields.help_text: Standard voice telephone, Videophone [VP], or Text-telephone device [TTD]

fields.label: State
options: Armed Forces (Canada, Europe, Africa, or Middle East)

fields.label: Choose a Subcommittee:
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
State, Foreign Operations, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA appropriations fall under the CJS subcommittee.

fields.label: Request Type:
fields.rationale: The primary goal is a programmatic funding increase to $9 billion.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Program or Language Title: (for Defense requests, include PE number)
fields.rationale: This is the standard short title for the programmatic funding request as identified in the provided reference values.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Describe the project or program, what it will do and why it is necessary
fields.draft_value:
* Funding for the NASA Science Mission Directorate to support Earth Science, Planetary Science, Astrophysics, Heliophysics, and Biological and Physical Sciences.
* Supports the execution of National Academies' Decadal Survey priorities, ensuring U.S. leadership in space exploration and scientific discovery.
* Provides for the development and operation of space-based observatories and robotic missions to explore the solar system and beyond.
fields.rationale: This draft identifies the primary divisions of SMD and connects the funding to the Decadal Surveys and U.S. leadership themes from the advocacy context.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Describe the problem or issue to be addressed through this request
fields.draft_value:
* Recent funding volatility has led to workforce instability, including layoffs and the loss of highly specialized aerospace engineering and scientific talent.
* Global competition in space science, particularly from China, threatens U.S. preeminence and the ability to set international norms for 21st-century exploration.
* Sustained, predictable investment is required to maintain complex mission schedules and prevent the erosion of decades of bipartisan progress in space science.
fields.rationale: Draws on the Advocacy Context regarding workforce stability, competition with China, and the need for stability following FY2026 disruptions.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Describe why this is a good use of taxpayer funds and how it benefits the district
fields.draft_value:
* Directly supports research and technical services in TX-09, including a $49,658 grant to the University of Texas Health Science Center at Houston for strategic science execution.
* Sustains local economic activity through contracts with district-based firms such as PKJ International LLC ($13,072) and Sri Global Inc ($12,250).
* Strengthens the local STEM pipeline and innovation economy by providing high-skill opportunities for the district's workforce and academic institutions.
fields.rationale: Specifically cites NASA spending data for TX-09, including the grant to UT Health Science Center and contracts for PKJ International and Sri Global.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Please include all such partners with whom you will be working or from whom you have requested additional funding for your program or project
fields.draft_value:
* The Planetary Society
* American Astronomical Society (AAS)
* American Geophysical Union (AGU)
fields.rationale: Lists the allied organizations provided in the Congressional Support section of the reference values.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Provide requested language and indicate whether it is bill language, report language or both
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly states that no bill or report language is being requested (N/A).

fields.label: Please provide request to include specific bill or report language that does not direct funding to a particular entity but encourages, urges, or directs some type of action.
fields.rationale: The request context specifies that no report or bill language is requested for this programmatic funding ask.

fields.label: Requested Funding Action:
options: Support the President's Current Budget Request
fields.rationale: The request specifies a target topline of $9 billion.

fields.label: Language Request Type:
fields.rationale: This request is focused on programmatic funding; no specific report or bill language is provided in the reference context.

fields.label: Funding Request:
fields.rationale: The request seeks $9 billion for the existing SMD program.

fields.label: Limit is 2000 characters.
fields.help_text: Provide request to fund a specific program or activity in the bill at a specified level.
fields.draft_value:
* We respectfully request $9,000,000,000 for the NASA Science Mission Directorate for Fiscal Year 2027.
* This level represents a necessary restoration of funding to ensure the stability of the American space science workforce and the continuity of priority missions.
* This investment supports the fundamental public responsibility of space exploration as codified in Title 51 of the U.S. Code.
fields.rationale: Uses the exact funding ask amount and incorporates the 'respectfully request' framing and Title 51 reference from the advocacy guide.

fields.label: Enter amount requested
fields.rationale: Matches the specified funding ask for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Enter amount of total budget
fields.rationale: Total requested budget for the Science Mission Directorate account.

fields.label: upload of budget section
fields.rationale: File must be attached manually.

sections.description: Provide previously enacted funding levels below, and list all dollar amounts in thousands (i.e. $1,500,000 not $1.5 million).

fields.label: President's budget amount:
fields.rationale: The FY2027 President's Budget Request amount is currently unknown as it has not been released.

fields.label: Enter Current YearPBRamount
fields.rationale: This corresponds to the FY2026 President's Budget Request for SMD.

fields.label: Enter Current YearHACamount
fields.rationale: The House Appropriations Committee amount for FY2026 was not provided; the FY2026 enacted level is $7.25 billion.

fields.label: Enter Current YearSACamount
fields.rationale: The Senate Appropriations Committee amount for FY2026 was not provided.

fields.label: Appropriations Conference
fields.rationale: This matches the FY2026 enacted level.

fields.label: Enacted Amount:
fields.rationale: This is the FY2026 enacted amount as provided in the reference data.

fields.label: Enter Last YearPBRamount
fields.rationale: Matches the FY2025 President's Budget Request.

fields.label: Enter Last YearHACamount
fields.rationale: FY2025 HAC specific amount not provided in context.

fields.label: Enter Last YearSACamount
fields.rationale: FY2025 SAC specific amount not provided in context.

fields.label: Appropriations Conference
fields.rationale: Matches the FY2025 enacted amount.

fields.label: Enter Previous YearPBRamount
fields.rationale: FY2024 budget request data not provided in reference context.

fields.label: Enter Previous YearHACamount
fields.rationale: FY2024 HAC specific amount not provided in context.

fields.label: Enter Previous YearSACamount
fields.rationale: FY2024 SAC specific amount not provided in context.

fields.label: Appropriations Conference
fields.rationale: FY2024 enacted data not provided in reference context.

fields.label: Upload Letters of Support
fields.help_text: Maximum 10 files. Required for Community Project Funding (CPF).
fields.rationale: File must be attached manually.
